name: culinary-bridge
description: HTTP bridge — exposes Antigravity built-in LM (Gemini 3.1 Pro) via local API for OpenClaw/ce-hub distillation pipelines

culinaryBridge.port.description: Local HTTP server port for the inference API. Reload the window to apply changes.

culinaryBridge.bearerToken.markdownDescription: Bearer token required in `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header. Use a long random string in production.

culinaryBridge.defaultVendor.description: Default model vendor hint passed to vscode.lm.selectChatModels(). Leave empty for any vendor.

culinaryBridge.defaultFamily.description: Default model family hint. Clients can override per-request via the 'model' field.

culinaryBridge.requestTimeoutMs.description: Maximum milliseconds to wait for a model response before returning 504.
